963c2751e943f97221f11e9069c761d03120cc73.description: Optional. For EVM (0x address), verification requests are normalized to the protocol hub chain. For non-EVM, include chain (CAIP-2) instead.

305e0d53da1d72ffe26504cc0bee3ddef0542409.description: Optional. For EVM (0x address), verification requests are normalized to protocol hub chain context. For non-EVM, include chain (e.g. solana:mainnet).

918f7f9b679fda606415fd1cf6d8195ffa32225f.description: Signer wallet address (who authenticates the request)

000648b90dd573ead7704bac9af057992adf446b.description: Optional: Wallet being verified (delegated subject). Must match signed payload for verifiers that support delegated subjects (allowsDelegatedSubject: true). Defaults to walletAddress if omitted. Only valid when all verifiers in verifierIds support allowsDelegatedSubject: true.

13cf9601350d700ae783a81ef9596b31d933da50.description: Required unless authenticated session is present

c450d3a068c40b593402a7bb527fbd728e270e03.description: Required unless authenticated session is present

39454044e76a5d12151fca54b59b770394930356.description: Pre-computed verifier content hash (32-byte hex). Treated as the canonical verifierContentHash for ownership-basic; if content is also provided, the verifier integrity-checks that they match.

f0c02d634a5625a42f39bcb0bd061738ca0d9d3c.description: Owner identifier (must match request walletAddress). Supports EVM (0x..), Solana (base58), NEAR (account IDs), and other universal address formats depending on chain context.

info.title: NEUS Network — Public Integrator API
info.description:
Public integrator surface for NEUS.

This spec is generated from the running Express routes and explicit public operation metadata.

Note: Some verifiers require pro access. Admin-only capabilities are excluded from this spec.

1e4cf91bbf157a2c4fcb07aa3b765d9cfc1c4829.description: Returns a list of all supported verifier IDs, full verifier metadata (schemas + flow/access semantics), and the backend chain configuration (hub chain, asset allowlists).

8e43c60131b93785b3f2572cd520030ce2cc1d59.description: Filter proofs by chain ID (e.g., 84532 for Base Sepolia)

158d501c62691267b577f4f613229d5af2aa1ab5.description: CAIP-2 chain reference for non-EVM signature verification (e.g. solana:mainnet)

92c2451227b5f6ac35898f3e68347b4c19f9ec96.description: Signature method hint for non-EVM signatures (e.g. ed25519)

9d0efa01c7d5b37521e0a71f0c4062e6287046ad.summary: Get proofs by wallet or DID

aa18bc6d7b7ce95fd461bfb085c0d54a8a598c98.summary: Get pricing information for all payment types
